synopsis: Judicial complaint by Rev. Harold L. Webb and Rev. Thomas Miller against Pacific Presbytery regarding its August 4, 1975 meeting conducted without the constitutionally required quorum of three teaching and three ruling elders. The Committee on Judicial Business determined the actions were irregular but recommended dismissal after Pacific Presbytery met in duly constituted session on September 10, 1975, with proper quorum and ratified all actions from the August 4 meeting.
